seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Harkaway and Harmers Haven. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Harkaway vs Harmers Haven: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Harkaway and Harmers Haven.
heading: Harkaway vs Harmers Haven — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Harkaway, Victoria and Harmers Haven, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Harkaway has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Harmers Haven (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Harkaway or Harmers Haven safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Harkaway has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Harmers Haven scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Harkaway scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Harmers Haven scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Harkaway or Harmers Haven?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Harkaway has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
